creator: ulassayginim@gmail.com
text:
hi 

can you update the port. because i still gives same error.
I know there is patch but port tree needs to be updated with 1.0.24-dev

and another point there is no DB6 selection for nss_ndb-1.0.23 but i remember , there was db6 support.
